text.title: Pricing Experiment Spec Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Missing required fields; violates schema constraints for `pricing-experiment-spec-template`. Validator rejects with explicit violation list.

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: design_ref missing or not matching an existing design id
variants array with fewer than 2 entries
